self.kiss: {user} kisses their own hand... how sad! 😢
self.pat: {user} pats themselves on the head... aww 😢
self.wink: {user} winks at themselves in the mirror 😉
self.smile: {user} smiles at themselves in the mirror 😊
self.waifu: {user} is their own waifu... how sad! 😢
self.shinobu: {user} tries to be Shinobu... and fails! 😅

bot.yeet: {user} tries to yeet {bot}! But {bot} is too strong! 💪
bot.cry: {user} makes {bot} cry! Why would you do that? 😢
bot.kill: {user} tries to kill {bot}! But I'm a bot, I can't die! 💀

other.slap: {user} slaps {target} around a bit with a large trout! 🐟
other.cry: {user} makes {target} cry! Why would you do that? 😢

errors.invalid_action: ❌ That's not a valid action! Use one of: ${VALID_ACTIONS.join(', ')}

thinking.desc:
## 🔮 Magic 8 Ball is thinking...
Wait a moment, let me divine your answer 😋🔮

answer.idk: 🥺 I don't know either, try asking your heart 😋
answer.secret: 🔮 It's a secret, I can't tell you 😋

guessnumber.desc:
I'm thinking of a number between **1 - {maxNumber}** 😋
Type your guess in the chat!
guessnumber.hint: Just type your number in the chat! 😋

sent.desc: Check your DM for the game! 😋

win.desc:
## 🎉 You Win!
🎯 The number was **{number}** 😋
You found it in **{attempts}** guesses!

lose.desc:
## ⏰ Time's Up 😭
Time's up! 😋
The answer was **{number}**

tictactoe.title: ## 🎮 Tic Tac Toe

error.title: ## ❌ Tic Tac Toe Error
error.rematch: Only players can start a rematch!
error.turn: It's not your turn, please wait! 😉

tictactoe.draw: 🤝 The game ended in a draw!
tictactoe.lose: ❌ I win... Better luck next time!
tictactoe.timeout: ⏳ Time's up! The game has been cancelled.

already.playing: ❌ You already have an ongoing Wordle game!

your.game: ❌ This is not your Wordle game!

invalid.word: ❌ The word "{word}" is not in the list! Try again.

footer.play: Click the 'Guess Word' button to answer.

bot.error: ❌ You can't marry bot! even the bot is realistic and pretty enough!

already.married: ❌ One or both of you are already married or have a pending proposal!

your.proposal: This isn't your marriage proposal to accept!

proposal.title: 💍 Marriage Proposal
proposal.description: {proposer} just popped the question to {target} in front of everyone! Will you say YES and make it official?
proposal.expired: This marriage proposal has expired or been cancelled.
proposal.rejected: ❌ The marriage proposal of {user1} and {user2} has been rejected.

congrats.title: 💕 Congratulations!
congrats.description: {user1} and {user2} are now married! May your love last forever! 💖

divorced.title: 💔 Divorced
divorced.description: Your marriage has been ended. Wishing you both the best in your future endeavors.

kiss.1: 💋 {user} gave {partner} a sweet kiss! How romantic!
kiss.2: 😘 {user} planted a big kiss on {partner}'s cheek! So cute!
kiss.3: 💏 {user} and {partner} shared a loving kiss! Aww!
kiss.cooldown: You can only kiss your partner once every hour! Please wait {minutes} more minutes.

partner.confirm: 💔 Your partner {partnerName} has requested a divorce in {serverName}. You must also confirm the divorce by using the `/marry divorce` command.

confirmation.needed:
## Divorce Confirmation Needed
✅ Divorce requested for this marriage.

Both you and your partner ({partner}) must use the /divorce command to confirm.

⏳ This divorce request will expire in 2 minutes.

already.confirmed: ❗️ You have already confirmed the divorce. Waiting for your partner.

your.side:
✅ Divorce confirmed on your side. Waiting for your partner to confirm as well.
Both must use /divorce within 2 minutes.

rps.title: ## ✂️ Rock Paper Scissors
rps.waiting: Waiting for {opponent} to pick their weapon...
rps.not_your_game: ❌ This isn't your game to play!

result.draw:
🤝 It's a draw!
You both picked {choice}!
result.timeout: ⏰ Time's up! **{opponent}** didn't respond. Game cancelled.

footer.play: Click a button to make your move!

math.title: ## 🔢 Math Quiz
math.question:
Solve: **{question}**
Streak: **{score}**
math.wrong:
❌ Wrong! The answer was `{answer}`.
Final streak: **{score}**
math.timeout:
⏰ Time's up! The answer was `{answer}`.
Final streak: **{score}**

leaderboard.title: ## 🏆 Math Quiz — Global Leaderboard
leaderboard.empty: No scores yet! Be the first to play with `/math`.

yourself.error: ❌ You can't add yourself as a friend!

already.friends: ❌ You are already friends or have a pending friend request with this user!

not.friends: ❌ You are not friends with this user!
not.found: ❌ Friend request not found or already processed.

request.title: 🤝 Friend Request
request.description: {proposer} wants to be friends with {target}! Will you accept?
request.expired: This friend request has expired or been cancelled.
request.rejected: ❌ The friend request from {user1} to {user2} was rejected.

removed.title: 💔 Friend Removed
removed.description: You are no longer friends with {user}.

list.title: ## 🤝 Your Friends
list.empty: You don't have any friends yet! Use `/friend add` to add someone.

not.friend: ❌ You can only summon your friends! Use `/friend add @user` to add them first.

dm.failed: ❌ I couldn't DM {user}. Their DMs might be closed.
dm.title: 🔔 You have been summoned!
dm.description:
You were summoned by **{author}** in the server **{server}**!
Click the button below to jump to the channel.
